---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us squash a bug in the CloudHOF system.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the Bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g., "The AI Deep Scan Verdict box is showing 'null' instead of the fallback string.")

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected Behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. 

**Screenshots / Console Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. If you know how to open the browser developer tools, pasting any red console errors here is massively helpful.

**Environment Context:**
 - OS: [e.g. iOS, Windows 11, macOS]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Brave]
 - Device: [e.g. iPhone 14, Desktop]

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., "This only happens after I connect my GitHub account").
